commits.message:
[Doc][Misc] Fix node IP/port description and add expected model results (#10248)

### What this PR does / why we need it?

This PR updates the `DeepSeek-V3.2.md` tutorial to:
1. Bold the hardware requirements for better readability.
2. Clarify the `<node0_ip>` and `<port>` descriptions for PD-separated
deployment scenarios.
3. Add the expected JSON response for the functional verification curl
command.

### Does this PR introduce _any_ user-facing change?

No, this is a documentation-only update.

### How was this patch tested?

Tested by running `format.sh` to ensure proper formatting.


- vLLM version: v0.21.0
- vLLM main:
https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/commit/9090368b650896bf5fc990c921df7eb4c20355a5

---------

Signed-off-by: s00569950 <songxueqiang@huawei.com>
Co-authored-by: s00569950 <songxueqiang@huawei.com>

files.patch:
@@ -16,8 +16,8 @@ Refer to [feature guide](../../user_guide/feature_guide/index.md) to get the fea
 
 ### Model Weight
 
-- `DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp-W8A8`(Quantized version): require 1 Atlas 800 A3 (64G × 16) node or 2 Atlas 800 A2 (64G × 8) nodes. [Download model weight](https://www.modelscope.cn/models/vllm-ascend/DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp-W8A8)
-- `DeepSeek-V3.2-w8a8`(Quantized version): require 1 Atlas 800 A3 (64G × 16) node or 2 Atlas 800 A2 (64G × 8) nodes. [Download model weight](https://www.modelscope.cn/models/vllm-ascend/DeepSeek-V3.2-W8A8/)
+- `DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp-W8A8` (Quantized version): requires **1 Atlas 800 A3 (64G × 16) node** or **2 Atlas 800 A2 (64G × 8) nodes**. [Download model weight](https://www.modelscope.cn/models/vllm-ascend/DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp-W8A8)
+- `DeepSeek-V3.2-w8a8` (Quantized version): requires **1 Atlas 800 A3 (64G × 16) node** or **2 Atlas 800 A2 (64G × 8) nodes**. [Download model weight](https://www.modelscope.cn/models/vllm-ascend/DeepSeek-V3.2-W8A8/)
 
 It is recommended to download the model weight to the shared directory of multiple nodes, such as `/root/.cache/`.
 
@@ -860,8 +860,8 @@ Once your server is started, you can query the model with input prompts:
 
 **Note**:
 
-- `<node0_ip>`: The IP address of the node where the server is running (e.g., localhost).
-- `<port>`: The port number specified in the server startup command (e.g., 8000).
+- `<node0_ip>`: The IP address of the node where the server is running (e.g., localhost). For PD-separated deployment, use the host IP of the node where the proxy script resides.
+- `<port>`: The port number specified in the server startup command (e.g., 8000). For PD-separated deployment, use the port configured in the proxy script.
 
 ```shell
 curl http://<node0_ip>:<port>/v1/completions \
@@ -874,6 +874,12 @@ curl http://<node0_ip>:<port>/v1/completions \
     }'
 ```
 
+**Expected Result**:
+
+```json
+{"id":"019eab54ead036b23e53f3a709e09289","object":"chat.completion","created":1780990929,"model":"deepseek_v3.2","choices":[{"index":0,"message":{"role":"assistant","content":"The future of AI is **not a single destination, but a complex, multi-faceted trajectory** that will reshape nearly every aspect of human society, technology, and our understanding of intelligence itself. It can be understood through several interconnected lenses:\n\n### "},"finish_reason":"length"}],"usage":{"prompt_tokens":9,"completion_tokens":50,"total_tokens":59,"completion_tokens_details":{"reasoning_tokens":0},"prompt_tokens_details":{"cached_tokens":0},"prompt_cache_hit_tokens":0,"prompt_cache_miss_tokens":9},"system_fingerprint":""}
+```
+
 ## Accuracy Evaluation
 
 Here are two accuracy evaluation methods.

commits.message: [Bugfix][CI] Fix Ninja Incremental Build in CI process (#10367) ### What this PR does / why we need it? This PR fixes several issues in the `csrc` build cache workflow. Main changes: * Keep the cache scope focused on incremental `csrc` build reuse. * The workflow restores and saves: * `csrc/build` * `csrc/third_party` * The workflow builds csrc cache based on dockfile env successfully. These changes make the cache producer workflow safer for PR validation while preserving the scheduled and push-based cache generation behavior for `main`. ### Does this PR introduce *any* user-facing change? No. This PR only changes CI workflow behavior for building, validating, restoring, and saving the `csrc` build cache. It does not change runtime behavior, APIs, model behavior, or user-facing interfaces. ### How was this patch tested? Validated with GitHub Actions workflow runs. Validation URL: [validation workflow URL here](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-ascend/actions/runs/27348205541) Here is some results - vLLM version: v0.21.0 - vLLM main: https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/commit/9090368b650896bf5fc990c921df7eb4c20355a5 --------- Signed-off-by: Hongyu Shi Signed-off-by: Shy0722 Signed-off-by: Shy Co-authored-by: Shy0722

files.patch:
@@ -67,6 +67,8 @@ jobs:
         UV_HTTP_TIMEOUT: 120
         UV_NO_CACHE: 1
         UV_SYSTEM_PYTHON: 1
+    env:
+      CSRC_BUILD_CACHE_IMAGE: swr.cn-southwest-2.myhuaweicloud.com/base_image/ascend-ci/cann:${{ matrix.group.image_tag }}
     steps:
       - name: Check NPU availability
         id: check_npu
@@ -113,6 +115,52 @@ jobs:
           git fetch origin main
           git rebase origin/main
 
+      - name: Get csrc build cache base branch
+        id: get_csrc_build_cache_base_branch
+        run: |
+          base_branch="${GITHUB_BASE_REF:-${GITHUB_REF_NAME:-unknown-branch}}"
+          base_branch=$(printf "%s" "$base_branch" | tr '/:@ ' '----' | tr -cd 'A-Za-z0-9._-')
+          if [ -z "$base_branch" ]; then
+            base_branch="unknown-branch"
+          fi
+          echo "base_branch=$base_branch" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+
+      - name: Get current cache time
+        id: get_cache_time
+        run: |
+          cache_time=$(date -u +'%Y%m%d%H%M%S')
+          echo "cache_time=$cache_time" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+
+      - name: Get csrc build cache arch
+        id: get_csrc_build_cache_arch
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          arch="$(uname -m)"
+          case "$arch" in
+            aarch64|arm64)
+              cache_arch="ARM64"
+              ;;
+            x86_64|amd64)
+              cache_arch="X64"
+              ;;
+            *)
+              cache_arch="$arch"
+              ;;
+          esac
+          echo "cache_arch=$cache_arch" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+
+      - name: Restore vllm-ascend csrc build cache
+        id: restore-csrc-build-cache
+        if: ${{ steps.check_npu.outputs.has_npu == 'true' }}
+        uses: runs-on/cache/restore@v5
+        with:
+          path: |
+            csrc/build
+            csrc/third_party
+          key: vllm-ascend-build-ninja-v1-${{ steps.get_csrc_build_cache_base_branch.outputs.base_branch }}-${{ runner.os }}-${{ steps.get_csrc_build_cache_arch.outputs.cache_arch }}-${{ env.CSRC_BUILD_CACHE_IMAGE }}-${{ steps.get_cache_time.outputs.cache_time }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            vllm-ascend-build-ninja-v1-${{ steps.get_csrc_build_cache_base_branch.outputs.base_branch }}-${{ runner.os }}-${{ steps.get_csrc_build_cache_arch.outputs.cache_arch }}-${{ env.CSRC_BUILD_CACHE_IMAGE }}-
+
       - name: Install Mooncake wheel
         if: ${{ matrix.group.npu_type != 'cpu' }}
         run: |
@@ -139,7 +187,7 @@ jobs:
           pip install uc-manager
           uv pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
           uv pip install --force-reinstall --no-deps triton-ascend==3.2.1
-          uv pip install -e .
+          uv pip install -e . --no-build-isolation
 
       - name: Install vllm-project/vllm-ascend no device
         if: ${{ matrix.group.npu_type == 'cpu' }}

@@ -59,8 +59,6 @@ jobs:
       - name: Generate build matrix from Dockerfiles
         id: generate
         run: |
-          python --version
-          python -m pip --version
           python -m pip install pyyaml
 
           if [[ "${{ github.event_name }}" == "push" ]]; then
@@ -122,7 +120,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install system dependencies (openeuler)
         if: matrix.os_type == 'openeuler'
         run: |
-          yum install -y gcc gcc-c++ cmake numactl-devel clang ninja-build
+          yum install -y python3-pip git vim wget net-tools gcc gcc-c++ make cmake numactl numactl-devel jemalloc patch
           pip install uv
 
       - name: Get current cache time
@@ -137,6 +135,7 @@ jobs:
         with:
           path: |
             csrc/build
+            csrc/third_party
           key: vllm-ascend-build-ninja-v1-${{ matrix.branch_normalized }}-${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.arch }}-${{ env.IMAGE_REGISTRY }}:${{ matrix.image_tag }}-${{ steps.get_cache_time.outputs.cache_time }}
           restore-keys: |
             vllm-ascend-build-ninja-v1-${{ matrix.branch_normalized }}-${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.arch }}-${{ env.IMAGE_REGISTRY }}:${{ matrix.image_tag }}-
@@ -146,51 +145,32 @@ jobs:
           SOC_VERSION: ${{ matrix.soc_version }}
           MAX_JOBS: "16"
         run: |
+          set -x
           source /usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/set_env.sh
           source /usr/local/Ascend/nnal/atb/set_env.sh
+
           arch=$(uname -i)
           export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=$LD_LIBRARY_PATH:/usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/${arch}-linux/devlib
-
-          if [ "${{ matrix.os_type }}" = "openeuler" ]; then
-            export CPLUS_INCLUDE_PATH=$CPLUS_INCLUDE_PATH:/usr/include/c++/12:/usr/include/c++/12/${arch}-openEuler-linux
-          fi
-
           pip install uc-manager
           # NOTE: indexes (ascend repo for triton-ascend + pytorch cpu whl) come from
           # UV_EXTRA_INDEX_URL. Do not pass --extra-index-url on the CLI here: it overrides
           # (does not append to) the env var and would drop the ascend repo.
           uv pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
           uv pip install --force-reinstall --no-deps triton-ascend==3.2.1
-
-          # Add jitter and retry around the source build because csrc build may download
-          # third-party release artifacts from external services that can temporarily
-          # throttle bursty requests.
-          initial_jitter=$((RANDOM % 60))
-          echo "Initial jitter before source build: ${initial_jitter}s"
-          sleep "$initial_jitter"
-
-          for attempt in 1 2 3 4; do
-            echo "uv pip install -e . attempt ${attempt}/4"
-
-            if uv pip install -e .; then
-              echo "uv pip install -e . succeeded"
-              break
-            fi
-
-            if [[ "$attempt" == "4" ]]; then
-              echo "::error::uv pip install -e . failed after 4 attempts"
-              exit 1
-            fi
-
-            backoff_seconds=$((attempt * 120 + RANDOM % 60))
-            echo "uv pip install -e . failed, retrying after ${backoff_seconds}s"
-            sleep "$backoff_seconds"
-          done
-
+          if uv pip install -e . --no-build-isolation; then
+            echo "vllm-ascend installed successfully"
+          else
+            echo "Failed to install vllm-ascend with incremental build, falling back to clean build"
+            rm -rf csrc/build
+            rm -rf csrc/third_party
+            uv pip install -e . --no-build-isolation
+          fi
+          
       - name: Save vllm-ascend csrc build cache
         if: success() && steps.restore-csrc-build-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
         uses: runs-on/cache/save@v5
         with:
           path: |
             csrc/build
+            csrc/third_party
           key: vllm-ascend-build-ninja-v1-${{ matrix.branch_normalized }}-${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.arch }}-${{ env.IMAGE_REGISTRY }}:${{ matrix.image_tag }}-${{ steps.get_cache_time.outputs.cache_time }}

commits.message:
[CI] Remove MiniMax M2.5 W8A8 QuaRot A2 nightly case (#10338)

### What this PR does / why we need it?

This PR removes the `MiniMax-M2.5-w8a8-QuaRot-A2` entry from the A2
single-node nightly test matrix.

The change retires the standalone `linux-aarch64-a2b3-8` job from
scheduled Nightly-A2 runs and from `workflow_dispatch` runs that select
all test cases. The underlying YAML test configuration is retained.

### Does this PR introduce _any_ user-facing change?

No. This is a CI-only change. Nightly-A2 will no longer schedule the
`MiniMax-M2.5-w8a8-QuaRot-A2` single-node case.

### How was this patch tested?

- `actionlint v1.7.7 .github/workflows/schedule_nightly_test_a2.yaml`
- `ruby -e 'require "yaml";
YAML.load_file(".github/workflows/schedule_nightly_test_a2.yaml")'`
- `git diff --check`

The commit includes a DCO `Signed-off-by` line matching the commit
author.

- vLLM version: v0.21.0
- vLLM main:
https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/commit/9090368b650896bf5fc990c921df7eb4c20355a5

Signed-off-by: MINGJING-WU <644617919@qq.com>

files.patch:
@@ -183,9 +183,6 @@ jobs:
           - name: qwen3-32b-int8
             os: linux-aarch64-a2b3-4
             config_file_path: Qwen3-32B-Int8-A2.yaml
-          - name: MiniMax-M2.5-w8a8-QuaRot-A2
-            os: linux-aarch64-a2b3-8
-            config_file_path: MiniMax-M2.5-w8a8-QuaRot-A2.yaml
           - name: Qwen3.5-27B-w8a8-A2
             os: linux-aarch64-a2b3-2
             config_file_path: Qwen3.5-27B-w8a8-A2.yaml
